_readme: APPROVED recipe: every knob pinned (a later generic-default change cannot restyle this look). starcomb resolution: CLI > this file > GENERIC.

notes.starless_denoise: off, not vstpost: the post-stretch VST (a self-flat denoise adaptation) crushes this moderate-contrast target's object chroma and smears the galaxy body; off restores the chroma and the subtle nebula dust at gate PASS
notes.red_halo: the bright-star red halo is a fast-lens-wide-open veiling-glare signature (an R-G plateau around bright stars, absent stopped down): honest optical data, never de-fringed in the render -- the fix is acquisition (stop the lens down)
notes.chroma_core: generic k=4 kept (neutral look); it mutes some real H-alpha colour on bright targets -- re-ladder only with a hypothesis

approved.note: the post-stretch VST was destroying moderate-contrast object colour across this class; off is the fix
